summary: Iteration 68 - Skip Onboarding Feature fully tested and working. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Skip onboarding feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoint POST /api/onboarding/{member_id}/skip works correctly. Frontend has 'Passer' button on each member card, dialog opens with member name, progress, and optional reason input. Confirming skip removes member from pending list.

GET /api/onboarding/pending.description: Returns pending members (not skipped, not completed, not coaches/IFRC)

POST /api/onboarding/{member_id}/skip.description: Marks member as skipped, removes from pending list, logs activity

skip_button_on_cards.description: 72 'Passer' buttons found on member cards with data-testid='skip-onboarding-{id}'

dialog_shows_member_info.description: Shows member name and progress (e.g., 'Adrienne Polli - 3/5 étapes (60%)')

cancel_button.description: Cancel button closes dialog without skipping
